zh.lifeSummary: 當Władysław I Piast於大約1225年出生時，他的父親Kazimierz I opolski Piast48歲，母親Wiola Opolska47歲。他於1251年與Eufemia Princess Of Kalisch在波蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1281年11月13日享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Władysław I Piast于大约1225年出生时，他的父亲Kazimierz I opolski Piast48岁，母亲Wiola Opolska47岁。他于1251年与Eufemia Princess Of Kalisch在波兰结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1281年11月13日享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: Piast
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of French and Walloon Piat: from the personal name Piat, from the Latin name Piatus ‘expiated’ (from the past participle of the verb pio ‘to appease; to expiate’). The name was borne by Saint Piatus of Tournai (in Wallonia, Belgium), who was martyred under the Roman Emperor Maximian c. 286 AD . Altered ending of the surname reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t. Compare Pyatt .
English (Lancashire and Cheshire): variant of   Pyatt  .

History: This surname (see 1 above) is listed along with the variant Pyatt in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Pyatt
meanings: English (mainly Staffordshire): nickname either from Middle English piot ‘magpie’ (Old French pïot, a diminutive of Old French pie), commonly used to denote a chattering woman, or alternatively from an unrecorded Middle English pyard, an uncomplimentary term derived from the same Old French word + -(h)ard. Compare Pye .
Variant of   Piatt  , a surname of French and Walloon origin.
History: This surname (see 2 above) is listed along with the variant Piatt in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

en.lifeSummary: When Władysław I Piast was born about 1225, his father, Kazimierz I opolski Piast, was 48 and his mother, Wiola Opolska, was 47. He married Eufemia Princess Of Kalisch in 1251, in Poland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 13 November 1281, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Władysław I Piast est né environ 1225, son père, Kazimierz I opolski Piast, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Wiola Opolska, avait 47 ans. Il a épousé Eufemia Princess Of Kalisch en 1251, à Pologne. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 13 novembre 1281, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Władysław I Piast um 1225 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Kazimierz I opolski Piast 48 und seine Mutter Wiola Opolska 47. Er hat 1251 in Polen Eufemia Princess Of Kalisch geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 13. November 1281 im Alter von 57 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Władysław I Piast è nato il circa 1225, il suo padre, Kazimierz I opolski Piast, aveva 48 anni e il suo madre, Wiola Opolska, aveva 47 anni. Lui sposato Eufemia Princess Of Kalisch nel 1251, nel Polonia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 13 novembre 1281, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Władysław I Piastが約1225年に生まれた時，父Kazimierz I opolski Piastは48歳，母Wiola Opolskaは47歳であった。1251年にポーランドでEufemia Princess Of Kalischと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1281年11月13日に57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Władysław I Piast(이)가 대략 1225년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Kazimierz I opolski Piast(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Wiola Opolska(은)는 47세였다. 그는 1251년 폴란드에서 Eufemia Princess Of Kalisch(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1281년 11월 13일 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Władysław I Piast nasceu aproximadamente 1225, seu pai, Kazimierz I opolski Piast, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Wiola Opolska, tinha 47 anos. Ele casou-se com Eufemia Princess Of Kalisch em 1251, em Polônia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 13 de novembro de 1281, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Władysław I Piast родился около 1225 г., его отцу по имени Kazimierz I opolski Piast было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Wiola Opolska, 47. Он женился на женщине по имени Eufemia Princess Of Kalisch в 1251 г. в местности Польша. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 13 ноября 1281 г. в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Władysław I Piast nació aproximadamente 1225, su papá, Kazimierz I opolski Piast, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Wiola Opolska, tenía 47 años. Se casó con Eufemia Princess Of Kalisch en 1251, en Polonia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 13 de noviembre de 1281, a la edad de 57 años.

ประมาณปี 1225–13 พฤศจิกายน 1281
